response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video for vocal music. The video contains only an instrumental background track for an end-of-broadcast screen for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams'. No vocal songs were detected. Consequently, no web search for lyrics was required.
response.global_summary: The video is the end-of-broadcast screen for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event, featuring instrumental background music and a message thanking the viewers.

scenes.description: End-of-broadcast screen with the event logo and text in both Japanese and English. Instrumental music plays.
